content:
Not in this session as currently wired.

I can use local CLI tools in principle, including `python -m arnold_pipelines.megaplan ...`, but every shell command is failing before execution with:

```text
bwrap: No permissions to create new namespace
```

So the blocker is the Codex sandbox wrapper, not Megaplan itself. I also don’t have the resident JSON tools as callable functions here; they’re listed in the prompt, but no `search_epics`, `cloud_status_chain`, or `list_cloud_checks` tool is actually exposed.

So my current status answer is still: no running epic/chain is visible in hot context, but I cannot independently refresh local Megaplan state until either the CLI sandbox is fixed or the resident tools are exposed as callable tools.
